start.npcText: "I heard — well, my scry-feed heard — that the old museum had something new." She nods at the riverglass, hat still in her hands. "My gran talked about this place. I didn't think it was still... anyway. What's the story with the locket?"

responses.text: Tell her where you found it, and what moves inside the glass

actions.log: Elsbeth insists on paying admission — five gold, pressed into your hand like a secret. The first admission in years.
